column1: # Source: TKC Legal Information Database (post-2012 lower-court judgments)
# Case identifiers anonymised per data provider terms of use
#   delta      : succession ratio distortion = (asset ratio) - (liability ratio)
#   phi_sign   : sign of successor net assets (positive/negative/boundary)
#   sigma      : 1 if suspicious post-division disposals observed

column10: Post-division share transfer to related party at below-market price
Multiple subsequent disposals; compound relief sought
Grey zone G2: phi near zero; value-compensation awarded
Organised asset flight; third-party transferees involved
Grey zone G3: division date close to insolvency date
Grey zone G4: business continues; mixed type
Severe distortion; successor insolvent; rapid disposal
